item.name: US Street Address API
item.description:
To get started, visit [https://www.smarty.com/account](https://www.smarty.com/account) and login with your credentials. Then, go to your API Keys and copy the auth-id and auth-token into the Current Value fields in the environment.

If at any point you're not sure what to do, documentation for the API and the variables associated with it can be found at: [https://www.smarty.com/docs/apis/us-street-api/reference](https://www.smarty.com/docs/apis/us-street-api/reference)

item.name: US Extract API

body.raw:
There are addresses everywhere.
1109 Ninth 85007
Smarty can find them.
3785 Las Vegs Av.
Los Vegas, Nevada
That is all.
